---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Goal

<!-- What outcome does this feature produce? One or two sentences. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why does this matter? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed approach

<!-- High-level description of how you'd implement it. Not required — leave blank if you have no strong opinion. -->

## Scope (for agents)

<!-- Files / modules expected to change. Be specific so two agents don't double-claim. -->
- `src/...`

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] ...
- [ ] `npm run test:run` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` clean
- [ ] `npm run build` clean
- [ ] CHANGELOG `[Unreleased]` updated

## Out of scope

<!-- Things deliberately left for a follow-up. -->
